description:
## Goal
New pass `ir_branch_fold` inside `ir_codegen::compile`'s post-type chain. Consumes `ModuleTypes::dead_branches`; rewrites each `Term::If(cond, then_b, else_b)` whose entry says `DeadBranch::Else` to `Term::Goto(then_b, vec![])` (and symmetrically for `Then`). Standard DCE then removes the now-orphaned blocks and unused TypeTest stmts.

## Depends on
- E2 (`dead_branches` published).
- E1 transitively (lowering tag ‚Äî though the fold itself doesn't read origin; it acts on any dead branch the typer proves, including user-authored ones; E1 only gates the diagnostic in E3).

## Slot in the pipeline
Inside `ir_codegen::compile`, after `apply_callsite_outcomes` and before `ir_fold::fold_module` (or replacing ir_fold's If branch ‚Äî see retirement note below). Standard `ir_dce::dce_module` runs after, as it does today, and cleans up.

## Retirements
- `ir_fold`'s `Term::If` cond-singleton fold (ir_fold.rs:83‚Äì98) is subsumed. When `cond` has type `:true`/`:false`, narrowing on the dead branch trivially empties the operand ‚Äî E2 records it as `DeadBranch`. Remove the cond-singleton case from `ir_fold` once `ir_branch_fold` is in place. ir_fold keeps its BinOp/TypeTest folds.

## Cascade
The fold acts on *any* dead branch the typer proves, not just destructure. Expect snapshot changes in:
- fn-clause dispatch with exhaustively-typed inputs (e.g. `fib_tailrec`, `list_primitives`)
- existing fixtures with provably-true type tests
- anywhere ir_fold's cond-singleton fold used to fire (same outcome via the new path)

Update `expected.clif` snapshots in the same commit. The diff is the *intended* improvement ‚Äî cleaner CLIF, fewer dead blocks.

## Convergence
Dead-branch elision strictly narrows block-entry types (fewer join predecessors ‚Üí tighter shapes). No re-typing needed before codegen because codegen reads `ModuleTypes` from before the fold for emit; types stay sound, just slightly looser than they could be. (Future ticket: re-type after fold to enable cascade folds. Out of scope here.)

## Done when
- `ir_branch_fold` lives at `src/ir_branch_fold.rs` and is wired into `ir_codegen::compile`.
- `ir_fold`'s If-fold case is removed.
- Quicksort and existing fixtures' `expected.clif` updated to reflect the cleaner shape.
- All tests pass.
title: E4: ir_branch_fold pass ‚Äî consume dead_branches, fold If‚ÜíGoto
